reviews.comment:
Pasamos la noche del 26 de enero de 2024. Muy linda habitación, con aire, tv y muy limpia. Todo impecable. Desayuno incluído. Super recomendable para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
We stayed the night of January 26, 2024. Very nice room, with air conditioning, TV, and very clean. Everything was spotless. Breakfast included. Highly recommended for a relaxing stay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURObi1PdndnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los chicos de la full y la playa  super atentos pero muy mala onda la chica que se ocupa de la limpieza de baños. Un día se puede tener un mal día pero siempre!! Ummm

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the beach and the resort were super attentive, but the girl who cleans the bathrooms was really rude. You can have a bad day once in a while, but all the time?! Ugh!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0cTdhUURBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación. Poca sombra. Tiene roto el calibrador de presión para las cubiertas. Baños y sanitarios semi limpios. El personal es amable y atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Good location. Little shade. The tire pressure gauge is broken. Bathrooms and restrooms are only partially clean. The staff is friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURod0luVkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Solo cargue nafta y compre en el full.En ninguna compra me cargaron los puntos cdo me dijeron q si: mala predisposición

(Translated by Google)
I only filled up with gas and bought things at the full service station. They didn't credit my points on any of my purchases, even though they told me they would: poor customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0N2EtUDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas las habitaciones pero el servicio de desayuno es muy pobre. No tienen casi nada en ese lugar. Raro porque las otras estaciones de serv están muy equipadas

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are very nice, but the breakfast service is very poor. They have almost nothing there. It's strange because the other service stations are very well-equipped.
